reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests asking the prescribing physician to weigh the newer Hunter library evidence: Hunter Williams, May 2026 Q&A | Retatrutide, Testosterone, Autoimmune, and Beyond (may-2026-qa-retatrutide-testosterone-autoimmune-and-beyond--ea9ba352, 2026-06-17, 20:22, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/may-2026-qa-retatrutide-testosterone-autoimmune-and-beyond--ea9ba352/): "Kiss-Peptin 30 minutes before sexual intercourse does seem to help with fertility, so we've trying that. Fingers crossed, we'll see what happens. But it does help. It is not a long-term solution for hormone replacement." Hunter Williams, TRT and Fertility: Comparing the Adjuncts That Actually Work (trt-and-fertility-comparing-the-adjuncts-that-actually-work--b01f0b2d, 2026-03-30, 14:18, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/trt-and-fertility-comparing-the-adjuncts-that-actually-work--b01f0b2d/): "I have seen more of this helping in the libido enhancement side of things."

- Hunter Williams, TRT and Fertility: Comparing the Adjuncts That Actually Work (trt-and-fertility-comparing-the-adjuncts-that-actually-work--b01f0b2d, 2026-03-30, 13:43, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/trt-and-fertility-comparing-the-adjuncts-that-actually-work--b01f0b2d/): "It does have a short half life, so it only is in circulation for minutes. - Hunter Williams, 2025 Research on Kisspeptin (email 19a31ff6dc2532d4, 2025-10-29): "Won't help primary gonadal failure ? if testes/ovaries can't respond, kisspeptin won't fix the downstream organ issue. Poor substitute for TRT."
